name: Enemy Intel
_source: s;SoldierBlue;Welcome to <red>watchtower</>. Me and the boys are busy monitoring the borders here.|Come stop by if you wanna know the latest news.|{c:e;SoldierBlue;Smile}And hey, come stop by if you just wanna have a chat too!|It can get pretty boring here most of the time.

s;SoldierBlue;Nothing to report right now, but I do got a nice tip for {e:v('JagenPronouns')['Address1C']} {v:JagenName}!|"Seasons come, seasons go. Nothing remains unchanged."|That's a saying we have 'round these parts.|If you wanna make the most of your time here in Chronos,|you gotta be aware of what's going on in the current season.|It's Spring right now, so nothing special is happening at the moment.|But come stop by on the last month of the season. In this case, that'll be May.|{c:e;SoldierBlue;Smile}I can tell you about what'll happen next season!|Heck, come by every month if you can! I've always got something new to talk about.
s;SoldierBlue;Rumor has it that some local bandits are starting to stir up trouble.|We'll keep an eye out for them here, Your Highness.

s;SoldierBlue;We've been keeping a close watch of the northern border|since Pedarion mercenaries have been causing trouble up there.|They're easy to track and take down since they're always travelling around on foot.
s;SoldierBlue;Sounds like the local Mage Guild is having some leadership disagreements or something.|Hopefully they'll get things sorted out all adult-like soon, get what I'm saying?
s;SoldierBlue;We've been seeing more wyvern activity up in the skies lately.|I don't think it's enough to cause concern, but we'll still keep an eye on them just in case.

s;SoldierBlue;We've been keeping a close watch of the eastern border at your father's request.|No signs of Centhippon soldiers out there, but apparently they're planning something.|We'll know if we see them. Their horses are easy to spot.

s;SoldierBlue;Looks like Spring's about to end, huh?|I can't wait for summer. You can catch the best fish then!|They sell for a good amount of gold too,|so might be worth it to cast your line if you're strapped for cash.
s;SoldierBlue;Bandit activity is on the rise, looks like.|Don't worry, we're handling it just fine! Their axes are no match for our swords!

s;SoldierBlue;The Pedarion mercenaries have been getting more gutsy lately.|They're comin' at us with all sorts of weapons: swords, lances, axes, bows, you name it!|We can hold the line for now, but{tgm}...|{tgm}Nah, I shouldn't be too concerned.|We've dealt with them before, and we can do it again!
s;SoldierBlue;Sounds like the Mage Guild got themselves a new leader.|The last guy didn't take the demotion too well from what I heard.|He almost burned the whole building to the ground!

s;SoldierBlue;Remember how there were more wyverns flying around?|Seems like more pegasi are up there too.|You don't typically see them together like that unless{tgm}...|{tgm}Hm, well, we'll keep a close eye on them.

s;SoldierBlue;Centhippon soldiers have been seen riding up to the border, {e:v('LordPronouns')['Address']}.|Looks like they've got some heavily-armored soldiers with them too.|Don't worry, we'll be careful 'round them.

s;SoldierBlue;You know those trinkets at the vendor that mess with your growth rates?|They're pretty good, but be careful with them!|If your growth rates get into the negatives, you'll start losing your stats.|So, keep an eye out on how you're allocating stuff.

s;SoldierBlue;Time sure flies by, huh, {e:v('LordPronouns')['Address1C']} {v:LordName}? Autumn's almost here!|Everyone's happier during the harvest season,|so you might see more bets being placed at the arena.|What better way to take the load off|than to watch big, muscly warriors beat the stuffing out of each other, am I right?
s;SoldierBlue;Those bandits not only have burly guys with axes,|but some swordfighters who're light on their feet too.|We gotta keep ourselves on our toes out there!
s;SoldierBlue;We got a good look at those Pedarion guys this month.|Our scouts have reported that they might have some guys in heavy armor amongst them.

s;SoldierBlue;Hey, remember the former leader of the Mage Guild?|Sounds like he's definitely got a huge chip on his shoulder.|Rumor has it that he and other former members of the guild are gonna riot.|We'll do our best to snuff 'em out before anything happens, but still, be careful.
s;SoldierBlue;Bad news, Your Highness.|Looks like those wyverns and pegasi are ridden by soldiers of the Cumualto Empire.|Not only that, sounds like they've got bowmen in their ranks too.
s;SoldierBlue;Looks like the Centhippons are mixing things up on us.|They've got both soldiers on horseback and some strong infantry too.

s;SoldierBlue;I have a helpful tip for you today.|When in a real battle, your enemies could have Skills of their own to use against you.|Make sure you get a good read on them before facing them head on!

s;SoldierBlue;A chill is starting to settle around here. You can feel it too, right?|The lake's gonna freeze over this winter as usual. So it'll be harder to fish.|{c:e;SoldierBlue;Smile}But, the local mines will still be open! I heard that the cold air brings in rarer gems.|{c:e;SoldierBlue;NoSmile}Not sure how that works. I'm not all studied up on my science-y stuff.

s;SoldierBlue;While you've been training up, looks like the enemies have been too.|Might go so far as to say that you guys will be about the same level of strength|if you guys were to go head to head.|Seems like they're always training up at the same pace as you are, just from observation.

s;SoldierBlue;Y'know, I've been sittin' here thinkin'{tgm}...|{tgm}I know we got these enemies to deal with,|but things could be different, y'know?|We could've been going up against a different bunch of baddies|if time was{tgm}...{tgm} different, I guess?|Like if fate decided to go in a different direction than how things are playing out now.|I know, I know, I'm talking nonsense, but it's something to think about.|Alternate timelines and all that.
s;SoldierBlue;Enemies are approaching, {e:v('LordPronouns')['Address']}! We have to prepare for battle soon!
